name: Degen Alpha Room
description: Telegram or Discord alpha room with paid access, copy links, live PnL panels, receipts, and explicit profit-share consent.
degenPitch: Turn the room into a paid alpha machine with receipts instead of trust-me-bro screenshots.
whatItDoes: Quotes room access and premium signal unlocks.
Shows live/paper badges, PnL stats, copy links, and receipts.
Applies Degen Alpha Room fees only after followers win and consent.
cursorPrompt: Build a Degen Alpha Room using DNA x402. Gate room access with receipts, show live/paper PnL badges, support copy links, require explicit follower consent for a 15% alpha fee only on positive finalized copied-lot PnL, and show 'No win, no alpha fee.'
suggestedPrompt: Build a Degen Alpha Room using DNA x402. Gate room access with receipts, show live/paper PnL badges, support copy links, require explicit follower consent for a 15% alpha fee only on positive finalized copied-lot PnL, and show 'No win, no alpha fee.'
exampleFlow: DNA x402 quote displays fee waterfall
Winning finalized copied lot accrues alpha fee
receiptProofBehavior: Receipt binds copied-lot alpha fee consent.
Fee waterfall stays visible before payment.
